# AI Tools Directory

> A curated directory of AI and LLM products maintained by AI engineer David Rose at drose.io.

Use the directory to find official product and source links, short factual summaries, fixed categories, and structured metrics when available. The directory describes third-party products; David Rose is the directory curator, not the creator of the listed tools.

## Directory

- [AI Tools Directory](https://drose.io/aitools): Browse and search the full public catalog.
- [AI Apps](https://drose.io/aitools/category/ai-apps): End-user AI applications.
- [Code Assistants](https://drose.io/aitools/category/code-assistants): AI coding and engineering tools.
- [Model Platforms](https://drose.io/aitools/category/model-platforms): Model providers and AI platforms.
- [Agent Tools](https://drose.io/aitools/category/agent-tools): Agentic workflow products.

## About

- [David Rose](https://drose.io): Directory curator; AI engineer working on LLMs and agentic systems.
- [David Rose on GitHub](https://github.com/cipher982): Public projects and source repositories.
- [XML sitemap](https://drose.io/aitools/sitemap.xml): Complete index of published directory pages.
